description.en: Change the display name on your JoAi profile. Your name is how your AI agent and other team members identify you in conversations and notifications.
description.de: Ändere den Anzeigenamen in deinem JoAi-Profil. Dein Name wird von deinem KI-Agenten und anderen Teammitgliedern in Unterhaltungen und Benachrichtigungen verwendet.
description.es: Change the display name on your JoAi profile. Your name is how your AI agent and other team members identify you in conversations and notifications.

description.ro: Change the display name on your JoAi profile. Your name is how your AI agent and other team members identify you in conversations and notifications.
description.it: Change the display name on your JoAi profile. Your name is how your AI agent and other team members identify you in conversations and notifications.
